decisions.decision: Move all phase 12 feature work off main onto gsd/phase-12-is-optional in superproject AND every modified submodule (graphql_engine, model-catalog-api, mint-ensemble-manager, ui, helm-charts)
decisions.rationale: User correction mid-session: never commit features on main. Cerebrum updated 2026-04-27.

decisions.decision: Pin ui image by full commit SHA, not branch tag
decisions.rationale: Docker tag spec forbids '/'; branch name has slash. SHA is unambiguous and immutable.

decisions.decision: Widen ui docker-publish.yml push trigger from '*' to '**' and sanitize SAFE_BRANCH (replace / with -)
decisions.rationale: '*' glob does not match slashed branch names — original workflow never triggered for gsd/* branches.

decisions.decision: continue-on-error: true on Trivy security scan job
decisions.rationale: Existing dependabot vulns were failing the workflow and blocking image publish. User explicitly requested allow-fail.

uncommitted_files: helm-charts/dynamo-values.yaml (gitignored inside helm-charts repo — local override only)

infrastructure.hasura_pod: mint-hasura-69f57b579-hxwb2 (was current at apply time; pod name may change after redeploy)
infrastructure.migration_applied: 1771200016000_modelcatalog_configuration_input_is_optional applied + metadata reloaded; column verified live: is_optional boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false
infrastructure.helm_values: helm-charts/dynamo-values.yaml — components.ui.image.tag set to e0547dd... pullPolicy=Always

next_action: 1) In ui submodule, run `gh run list --branch gsd/phase-12-is-optional --limit 5` to confirm docker-publish succeeded and image was pushed. 2) `helm upgrade mint helm-charts/charts/<chart> -f helm-charts/dynamo-values.yaml -n mint` (or equivalent) to roll new ui pod. 3) Visually verify checkbox + badge in browser. 4) Re-invoke /gsd-execute-phase 12 to finalize 12-05 SUMMARY and run phase verification.
context_notes: Phase 12 feature work was committed to main initially; mid-session user corrected and we moved everything to gsd/phase-12-is-optional via update-ref + symbolic-ref (preserved working tree). 4/5 plans complete with SUMMARY.md, STATE.md, ROADMAP.md updates landed. Plan 12-05 code is committed but final verification + SUMMARY pending. CI workflow had two latent bugs (slash branch glob, slash docker tag) — both fixed. Trivy allow-fail. helm tag pinned to ui SHA e0547dd.
